input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule EV.8.2.6 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: ev.8.2.6
            TITLE: the charger must have two tsmps installed, see ev.5.8.2

            CONTENT:
            rule EV.8.2.6: The Charger must have two TSMPs installed, see EV.5.8.2
EV.8.2.6 The Charger must have two TSMPs installed, see EV.5.8.2
Formula SAE® Rules 2024 © 2023 SAE International  Page 106 of 140   
Version 1.0   1 Sep 2023

final_answer: The Charger must have two TSMPs installed, see EV.5.8.2
